Session.title: Session
Session.description: Represents a user's active session for single-login enforcement.

userId.description: The unique identifier of the user (username).

sessionId.description: The unique identifier for the current browser session.

lastActive.description: The timestamp of the last activity in this session.

/sessions/{userId}.description: Stores the active session for each user.

/users/{userId}/tts_history/{historyId}.description: Stores the history of text-to-audio conversions for each user.
